templates.name: Mutual NDA
templates.description: Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (standard terms).

templates.name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
templates.description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual NDA capturing party details and key deal terms; incorporates the standard terms by reference.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement (CSA) for vendors offering cloud-based services.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for early-stage product development collaborations between a vendor and a design partner.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement covering uptime commitments, support response times, and service credits.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement for consulting, implementation, and other professional services engagements.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement (DPA) for GDPR- and CCPA-aligned personal data handling between controllers and processors.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement for on-premise or self-hosted software licensing.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement for go-to-market, reseller, and channel partnerships.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for time-bound proof-of-concept evaluations of a product or service.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement (BAA) for HIPAA-covered relationships involving protected health information.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum to layer onto an existing agreement to address AI-specific obligations and responsibilities.
